limitations: Operator chat timing inside this slice is approximate unless anchored to repo receipts.
The 0.6.24 package report proves build inventory only; it records distributed:false and does not establish live prerelease authority.

entries.speaker: operator
entries.message: The operator explicitly stopped further debugging and required an exact rollback to the last clearly working core-player version instead of more forward fixes.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Selected 0.6.10 at commit 9154ad5 as the last clearly user-confirmed working core-player baseline and restored the exact core runtime files from that commit.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Built 0.6.24 cleanly from the restored 0.6.10 core-player runtime.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Regenerated the 0.6.24 package inventory with -SkipVarDistribute and confirmed it remains build-only with distributed:false.

entries.speaker: assistant
entries.message: Deployed the raw direct core-player asset and plugin as the live 0.6.24 alpha dev_deploy seam from the restored 0.6.10 runtime.

decisions: 0.6.24 is a pure rollback slice that restores the exact 0.6.10 core-player runtime under a fresh semantic version.
The live authority seam for this slice is the raw direct core-player dev_deploy asset plus plugin, not the hosted modern_tv witness seam and not the .var package.
openQuestions: Does the exact 0.6.10 core-player runtime still behave as the last clearly working baseline in the current operator test lane?
notes: This slice intentionally does not carry later playlist, hosted proof, resize, or sync experiments forward.
The 0.6.24 package report exists only as build inventory and does not compete with the raw direct core-player dev_deploy authority.
